families.label: Club Orange
families.description: Club Orange membership and community referral program.

offers.label: Club Orange signup referral
offers.offerSummary: Join Club Orange through a referral-aware signup link.
offers.termsSummary: See the current Club Orange signup page for the latest referral terms and eligibility details.

matchers.label: Hosted signup path code
matchers.explanation: Club Orange hosted signup links encode the referral token in the /co/<code> path.

matchers.label: Canonical signup referral query
matchers.explanation: The canonical Club Orange signup page uses the referral query parameter to carry the token.
